message:
feat(tutorial): add Stripe-level UI/UX polish to tutorial components

Enhance tutorial components with premium visual effects and micro-interactions:

TutorialProgress:
- Add cursor-following spotlight effect on desktop sidebar
- Add celebration sparkles when steps complete
- Add animated gradient shimmer on progress bar
- Enhance mobile gesture hint with auto-fade
- Add glass-morphism container styling

TutorialStep:
- Add orbiting sparkle animation on header icon
- Add pulsing glow ring effect
- Enhance step/time badges with hover interactions
- Add interactive checklist with progress tracking
- Improve navigation buttons with shimmer on final step
- Enhance collapsible sections with stagger animations

TutorialTip:
- Add gradient backgrounds for all variants
- Add icon glow effect on hover
- Add attention pulse for warning/important variants
- Improve icon animations per variant type
- Add subtle top border highlight

All changes maintain accessibility, 44px touch targets, and prefersReducedMotion support.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
